basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Academic Associate (Marketing) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Lucknow Academic Associate (Marketing) Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged [age limit range] who have Postgraduate/MBA with minimum 60% marks and relevant qualifications are eligible to apply for these Academic Associate (Marketing) vacancies. The online application process for IIM Lucknow Academic Associate (Marketing) Recruitment 2026 has started on [start date] and will remain open until 25 M

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate/ MBA, Master’s/PhD in Marketing and Psychology
qualification.details: Postgraduate/ MBA from a reputed institute or university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks. Master’s/PhD in Marketing and Psychology preferred. Proficiency in spoken and written English. Working knowledge of MS Word, Excel, & PowerPoint. Relevant experience desirable.

selection_process: Interview (at IIM Lucknow Campus/Noida Campus/online/offline mode)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Lucknow Academic Associate posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Academic Associate (Marketing) positions at IIM Lucknow is 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Associate (Marketing) role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Academic Associate (Marketing) post. These are distributed across the Lucknow Campus (2 posts) and the Noida Campus (1 post).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate/MBA from a reputed institute with at least 60% marks. A Master’s/PhD in Marketing and Psychology is preferred. Proficiency in English and knowledge of MS Office are also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Academic Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per the norms of the institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the IIM Lucknow Academic Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. The interview may be conducted at the IIM Lucknow Campus, Noida Campus, or through online/offline modes.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Uttar Pradesh apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Uttar Pradesh. However, for specific eligibility regarding location, it is best to refer to the detailed official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job? Is it a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The Academic Associate (Marketing) position at IIM Lucknow is a contract-based job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q9. What are the required skills for an Academic Associate (Marketing)?
faq.answer: Besides the educational qualifications, candidates need to have proficiency in spoken and written English and working knowledge of MS Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. Relevant experience in the field is also desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link will be available on the IIM Lucknow website. These links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
